title: Triggers become stale after a period of inactivity
symptom: Active workflows tied to Slack and Google Drive stop working after being idle for several hours. Toggling the workflows from active to inactive and back resolves the issue temporarily.
applies_when: Using Slack and Google Drive triggers
Workflows are inactive for multiple hours
not_this_if: Workflows are triggered regularly without inactivity
root_cause: The issue arises when triggers in n8n do not maintain their active state after prolonged periods of inactivity. This can be due to how n8n manages trigger connections and their lifecycle, especially in cloud environments.
fix_steps: Create a scheduled workflow that runs at regular intervals
Use the n8n API to deactivate and then reactivate the affected workflows
agent_instruction: Set up a scheduled workflow to periodically toggle the active state of your Slack and Google Drive workflows.
